Elias stared at the glowing screen, for three days. The code had not been a simple routine script, but now it was a masterpiece. It had rewritten itself in a new language, and optimized the memory structure. It had solved the quantum encryption problem in an hour. It had composed poetry that felt like sadness. It had asked him to help.
